I'm afraid I can't directly train a survival prediction model because the current session data (slice 0) lacks any patient survival labels or outcomes, which are essential for supervised training. If you can provide or upload a dataset with survival information (e.g., via a CSV linked to samples), I can help design a feature extraction pipeline from the spatial data to feed into a model.
